category_sources: source_facts.description says inxi is a full featured CLI system information tool; official smxi.org docs call inxi a full featured system information script.

docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official smxi.org inxi documentation page.
repo_sources: source_facts.source-archive is from codeberg.org/smxi/inxi; official smxi.org source repositories page says smxi.org code is available at codeberg.org/smxi and lists inxi.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies a CLI system information tool; official smxi.org docs cover hardware/system reporting and command options.
